overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Vespucci Beach promenade at dusk. The character moves past palm trees, beachfront buildings with graffiti and storefronts, and various pedestrians while streetlights illuminate the cooling evening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner transitioning to beach promenade

events.description: turns right from the street onto the beachfront promenade sidewalk
begins walking straight along the wide concrete promenade

agents.ego_description: walking from the urban street onto the beachfront promenade, navigating around a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: black sedan parked at the curb near the intersection

entered.detail: dark colored sedan parked by the curb with brake lights on
two-story building with green trim around windows and wooden double doors
distant city skyline with tall buildings visible down the street
tall palm trees lining the beach side of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an urban street at dusk, with the camera turning right onto the Vespucci Beach promenade. A black sedan is parked at the curb, and the downtown skyline is visible in the distance. The character walks onto the wide concrete sidewalk as palm trees line the right side leading toward the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach promenade with palm tree lining and ocean view

events.description: slight adjustment to path to navigate around oncoming pedestrian
pedestrian in gray dress passes close to the camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide promenade, passing scattered pedestrians and approaching the large beachfront building

notable_agents.action: woman in gray dress walking toward camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: large multi-story building with wooden pergola structure on the roof and arched windows
covered structures and seating areas on the sand side of the promenade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open promenade with full sky visibility, the character approaches the large pergola-topped building on the left. Palm trees line the right side leading to the beach. A pedestrian in a dress walks past the camera, and the downtown skyline shifts to the left as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront commercial building with graffiti walls and tattoo parlor

events.description: turns left to follow the corner of the large building
passing by pedestrians gathered near the tattoo parlor entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left around the corner of the large building, passing pedestrians standing on the steps and near the entrance

notable_agents.action: man in yellow shirt standing near the building entrance looking at phone

entered.detail: low concrete wall with colorful graffiti murals in blue and green
vertical black sign with yellow text reading TATTOOS
building with white FOR LEASE signs on shuttered storefront windows

segments.scene_description: The character turns left around the corner of the large pergola building, revealing a graffiti-covered wall and tattoo parlor entrance. Pedestrians stand on the steps and sidewalk near the entrance. The building features colorful murals and signage, with a for-lease building visible further down the block.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial strip with souvenir shops and pedestrian activity

events.description: navigating through denser pedestrian area with people crossing paths
passing by storefront with colorful merchandise and sale displays

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts and pedestrians in the busy commercial beach area, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket and hat walking away from camera along the promenade

entered.detail: storefront with colorful items, mannequins, and sale signs displayed outside
multiple yellow sandwich board signs advertising sales and tattoos

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a denser commercial area with souvenir shops and tattoo parlors. Yellow sale signs line the sidewalk, and pedestrians browse the storefronts. The character continues past the for-lease building and colorful storefronts toward an open intersection area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open urban street at dusk into a dense, colorful commercial district along the beach. It begins by turning right onto the wide concrete promenade of Vespucci Beach, passing a parked black sedan with the distant downtown skyline framing the horizon. As the character moves forward, the view opens up to reveal palm trees lining the shore and a large pergola-topped building, while the skyline shifts position behind a passing pedestrian. The scene then turns left around the corner of the pergola, shifting from the open waterfront to a gritty urban corridor defined by graffiti-covered walls and a tattoo parlor entrance. Finally, the camera glides through a crowded commercial stretch of souvenir shops and yellow sale signs, passing a for-lease building before heading toward an open intersection.
